controls.description: Governance gate fails when any agentic residual-risk Next review date is overdue or malformed.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count and pass_rate for residual review-date freshness checks

controls.description: Governance gate fails when business risk appetite policy is missing, overdue, malformed, or missing mappings for high-consequence residual risks.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count and pass_rate for appetite policy validity checks

controls.description: Generate architecture artifacts from code and enforce architecture-conformance policy rules (forbidden/required dependencies) via portable Claude skills (/c4, /c4-check) and architect agent advisory.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: architecture_policy_violation_count and pass_rate for conformance checks

controls.description: Fail when MADR required sections are missing.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count and pass_rate for structural governance checks

controls.description: Prevent auth/secrets leakage via staged-file checks, staged diff secret pattern checks, CI secret scanning, and tracked-secret-file blocking.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: false_positive_rate and false_negative_rate for security policy violations

controls.description: Runtime service enforces Google OIDC auth on projection requests when enabled (or explicit auth-off mode by environment), plus per-client request throttling and bounded request-body size to reduce exposed endpoint abuse risk.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for unauthorized/abusive projection request blocking

controls.description: Trend-based telemetry gate computes rolling-window in-flight overlap block events from workflow evidence and enforces AR14 thresholds.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: block_rate and false_negative_rate for AR14 threshold detection

controls.description: Pre-push hook runs eslint locally so lint errors are caught before push, preventing pipeline failures and trunk breakage from code style issues.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and feedback_latency_seconds for local lint gate

controls.description: When trunk is red, block non-pipeline pushes and provide explicit recovery instructions for developers.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: block_rate and mean_runtime_seconds for flow-protection gate

controls.description: Images are keylessly signed and signature provenance is verified against GitHub OIDC issuer/identity before each deployment.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: false_positive_rate and false_negative_rate for security policy violations

controls.description: Deploy to Cloud Run and verify service readiness on test/release/prod environments before release progression.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: false_positive_rate and false_negative_rate for security policy violations

controls.description: Verify release/prod service /health build SHA equals workflow commit SHA after deploy to prevent wrong-revision validation.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Publish pipeline builds and signs off one immutable image digest, then deploys that exact digest to release and prod.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Scheduled synthetic monitoring for release/prod executes health plus deterministic end-to-end projection transaction checks and enforces failure thresholds.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count of live monitor threshold breaches and pass_rate of live-ops-health runs

controls.description: Serialize publish branch promotions so only one publish pipeline run can mutate release/prod environments at a time.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Release submission is blocked unless all required quality/security workflows are green for the exact source SHA.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: GitHub repository rulesets enforce non-destructive main updates and PR-reviewed publish updates with strict required check contexts, including release PR preview verification before merge.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Release PR preview verification includes functional smoke test: root page HTML check and health endpoint verification (DB connectivity + synthetic projection probe).
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate of release preview smoke tests

controls.description: Trend-based telemetry gate enforces AR13 fanout duration SLA by failing on configured consecutive release duration breaches.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: mean_runtime_seconds and breach_streak for release feedback loop

controls.description: Run independent CI checks in parallel and gate build/release steps on all fanout jobs succeeding.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: block_rate and mean_runtime_seconds for flow-protection gate

controls.description: Block pushes to main/master when the required trunk pipeline is still queued or in progress.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Run deterministic WCAG 2 A/AA accessibility smoke checks (axe-core) against the rendered UI and fail on violations before build/release progression.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic WCAG A/AA accessibility checks

controls.description: Run rendered-pixel contrast checks (axe-core color-contrast rule via Playwright headless Chromium) against the UI. Catches WCAG 1.4.3 and 1.4.11 failures that JSDOM-based checks cannot detect because they require a real rendering engine to compute inherited CSS color values.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate for rendered contrast checks

controls.description: Run deterministic application unit tests in main and publish pipelines before release progression.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: coverage_pct and false_negative_rate on changed app paths

controls.description: Changed executable lines in app source must satisfy minimum coverage threshold from policy.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: coverage_pct and false_negative_rate on changed app paths

controls.description: Projection path validates event shape before applying event-sourced transformations.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Run deterministic parse+projection throughput and p95 latency benchmark gate for live-scoring utterance workloads, with fresh product-validity drill evidence for game-day trust signals.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and mean_runtime_seconds for deterministic live-scoring performance gate

controls.description: Run deterministic migration contract fixtures to verify legacy event-to-stat mapping and jersey canonicalization behavior.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: fixture_pass_rate and mapping_false_negative_rate for migration contract tests

controls.description: Touched app source files cannot regress below stored per-file coverage baseline.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: coverage_pct and false_negative_rate on changed app paths

controls.description: Run deterministic roster assignment overlap checks to prevent same-jersey identity collisions across active intervals.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: collision_detection_rate and false_negative_rate for roster identity overlap checks

controls.description: App source changes must include changed co-located tests in the same module directory.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: coverage_pct and false_negative_rate on changed app paths

controls.description: Run deterministic certified workbook parity checks with a fast smoke profile on top metrics before full fixture parity and release progression.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: parity_pass_rate and false_negative_rate on certified workbook fixture metrics

controls.description: Workflow token permissions default to read-only and are elevated only per job where mutation or OIDC is required.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Use a dedicated GCP project for addressr workloads and enforce repo-committed cloud policy (project id/number/region) parity with GitHub vars and live GCP metadata.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: GitHub Actions deploy path uses Workload Identity Federation with short-lived credentials and no static JSON key.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: false_positive_rate and false_negative_rate for security policy violations

controls.description: Scheduled cloud audit checks IAM/OIDC conformance and fails on Cloud Run mutations without approved GitHub OIDC provenance claims (not principal email alone).
controls.effectiveness_kpi: false_positive_rate and false_negative_rate for security policy violations

controls.description: After each deploy, verify service readiness plus ingress, invoker IAM, and runtime service account conformance before promotion continues.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: false_positive_rate and false_negative_rate for security policy violations

controls.description: Scheduled cloud governance audit enforces privileged IAM role allowlists so only deploy SA and approved break-glass owner retain mutation capability.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: false_positive_rate and false_negative_rate for security policy violations

controls.description: Block deploy-path drift by structurally parsing workflow YAML and enforcing deploy/IAM mutation policy at run-step level in approved workflows only.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Break-glass runbook mandates temporary conditional grants, immediate privilege removal, and same-day reconciliation evidence with schema/timeliness enforced in maintenance log.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Pin third-party actions to immutable commit SHAs, use npm ci for immutable install resolution, and verify downloaded security-tool binaries with published checksums.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Local controls doctor validates Node/toolchain/hook operability and one-command bootstrap restores the local gate stack to a known-good state.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and mean_runtime_seconds for local-control operability checks

controls.description: Pin local developer Node runtime to a known major version and block local gate execution on mismatch before tsx/esbuild-backed controls run.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Fail when test-to-source LOC ratio is below floor.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: coverage_pct and false_negative_rate on changed app paths

controls.description: Residual-risk telemetry gate enforces AR20 branch-divergence thresholds (PR age and changed-lines) aligned to trunk-based DORA flow risk, surfacing Gall's curse signals when integration delay and batch size increase.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count of AR20 threshold breaches and pass_rate of residual-risk telemetry runs

controls.description: Block TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX markers in code files.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Fail when proposed decisions exceed staleness threshold.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count and pass_rate for structural governance checks

controls.description: Fail when decision files are not indexed.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count and pass_rate for structural governance checks

controls.description: Traceability validator must accept both AR* and ISO R* risk IDs so control-to-risk mapping cannot silently drop non-agentic risks.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: Traceability gate enforces minimum control depth for selected high-materiality risks to avoid brittle single-control coverage.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count and pass_rate for risk stack depth policy checks

controls.description: Governance gate fails when incident/tabletop/break-glass rehearsal evidence is stale beyond policy threshold.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: days_since_last_incident_rehearsal and pass_rate for rehearsal freshness gate

controls.description: Independent reviewer gate with provider adapter, full-diff chunk coverage, and bounded retry loop using policy max_iterations.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate + false_negative_rate for independent review decisions

controls.description: Fail when maintenance log is stale.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: block_rate and mean_runtime_seconds for flow-protection gate

controls.description: Cap control surface area and LLM review runtime envelope with deterministic entropy budgets.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count and pass_rate for structural governance checks

controls.description: Governance gate fails when control-pruning policy is missing, overdue, malformed, or not tied to explicit delivery-metric thresholds.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count and pass_rate for control-pruning policy validity checks

controls.description: Dependency maturity/security gate to reduce stale-dependency risk without adopting rushed releases.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate

controls.description: All executable controls are invoked via package.json aliases; fail on orphan scripts not referenced by package scripts.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: drift_count and pass_rate for structural governance checks

controls.description: LLM reviewer assesses outage fallback quality against a concrete trunk CI outage playbook so zero-trust trunk operation remains understandable and recoverable.
controls.effectiveness_kpi: pass_rate and false_negative_rate for deterministic invariant gate
